# HTML.Strict.txt 知识梳理

> 来源: `HTML.Strict.txt` | 字数: 221

## 内容全文

HTML.Strict

TYPE: bool

VERSION: 1.3.0

DEFAULT: false

DEPRECATED-VERSION: 1.7.0

DEPRECATED-USE: HTML.Doctype

--DESCRIPTION--

Determines whether or not to use Transitional (loose) or Strict rulesets.
